cleavage agent: Samples were digested with 2 μg trypsin in 50 mM NH4HCO3 at 37 °C overnight.
enrichment method: Streptavidin affinity capture of biotinylated proteins coupled to mass spectrometry identified all augmin subunits...
fractionation method: Samples were cleaned through C18 tips (polyLC C18) and peptides were eluted in 5% NH4OH/30% methanol.
fragmentation method: the top speed (most intense) ions were fragmented by CID and detected in the linear ion trap.
instrument: the outlet of the column was directly connected to a TriVersa NanoMate (Advion) fitted on an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos™ Tribrid (Thermo Scientific).
ionization type: the outlet of the column was directly connected to a TriVersa NanoMate (Advion)...
labeling: Samples were injected in duplicate (5 μl per injection).
